title: NSDC is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: NSDC is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Subject Matter Expert in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!
